title: Story Math
subtitle: Solve story problems
instructions: Read each short story and choose the correct answer.

items.prompt: Mia has 2 apples. She gets 3 more. How many now?
Leo has 6 blocks. 2 fall down. How many left?
There are 4 birds on a tree. 1 more comes. Total?
A bag has 7 candies. You eat 3. How many remain?
You have 5 pencils and a friend gives 2 more. Total?
